intro.headline: Protecting Real Estate Investors Since 1989
intro.body: SES Risk Solutions is a leading program administrator specializing in property insurance for real estate investors. As part of the Alliant Insurance Services family, we combine decades of niche expertise with the resources of one of the nation's largest insurance brokerages. Our data-driven underwriting, proprietary technology platforms, and deep distribution partnerships make us the trusted choice for insuring investor-owned residential properties.

overview.description: Our core programs are designed to insure properties held in trust and owned by real estate investors. We focus on innovation, risk management, and client solutions to serve the ever-changing market. Our proprietary policy administration system is API-enabled and offers web-based self-service.
highlights: Data-driven underwriting with in-house actuarial team
Proprietary quoting and policy management systems (TIMS, QUBIE)
AI/ML-powered risk scoring using aerial imagery and proximity signals
Longstanding partnerships with 1,000+ agents, brokers, and wholesalers
PowerBI dashboards delivering live KPIs and performance tracking

products.name: SFR Portfolio
products.description: Core program for investors with 5+ properties

products.name: Single Family Portfolio
products.description: Our flagship program supporting real estate investors with portfolios of 5 or more single-family residential properties. Designed for mid-size portfolios and property managers seeking comprehensive coverage with competitive pricing.
eligible: Properties in most US states (see appetite guide)
ineligible: Properties with open foundation or structural damage
Properties in coastal wind zones (specific counties)
coverage: Dwelling coverage (Replacement Cost or Actual Cash Value)
Loss of rents / Fair rental value
policyFeatures: Automatic coverage for newly acquired properties (30 days)

products.name: Multifamily Portfolio
products.description: Tailored coverage for investors and property managers with multifamily residential portfolios. Supports apartment buildings, duplexes, triplexes, and small apartment complexes with total insured values between $1M and $30M.
ineligible: Properties with more than 2 losses in 3 years
policyFeatures: Loss of rents with extended period option
Quarterly or annual premium payment options

products.name: SF Individual Asset
products.description: Our automated, self-service underwriting platform for brokers and individual property investors. Powered by QUBIE, our proprietary quoting engine that delivers instant quotes using AI-driven risk scoring, aerial imagery analysis, and real-time data validation.
ineligible: Properties with prior arson or fraud claims
coverage: Loss of rents / Fair rental value
policyFeatures: Instant online quotes via QUBIE platform
